<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
<title>Typing Game ⌨</title>
<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-family: Arial;
  background: #111;
  color: white;
}

#game {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
}

.word {
  position: absolute;
  font-size: 20px;
  color: #0f0;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#inputBox {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 20px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  padding: 10px;
  font-size: 18px;
  width: 200px;
}

#score {
  position: fixed;
  top: 10px;
  left: 10px;
}

/* MODAL */
.modal {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  display: none;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

.box {
  background: white;
  color: black;
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="score">Score: 0</div>
<div id="game"></div>
<input id="inputBox" placeholder="Type here..." autofocus />

<!-- MODAL -->
<div id="gameOverModal" class="modal">
  <div class="box">
    <h2>Game Over</h2>
    <p id="finalScore"></p>
    <button onclick="location.reload()">Chơi lại</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const wordsList = [/* giữ nguyên list của bạn */ 
"html","css","javascript","game","code","win","play","fun","typing","fast",
"slow","quick","speed","keyboard","mouse","screen","browser","window","input","output",
"click","press","enter","space","shift","control","alt","escape","delete","insert",
"function","variable","constant","object","array","string","number","boolean","null","undefined",
"loop","condition","switch","case","break","continue","return","async","await","promise",
"random","shuffle","select","filter","map","reduce","sort","search","find","replace",
"create","update","delete","render","display","layout","design","style","color","theme",
"button","modal","popup","overlay","animation","transition","transform","rotate","scale","translate",
"responsive","adaptive","mobile","desktop","tablet","resolution","viewport","dimension","pixel","ratio",
"performance","optimization","efficiency","memory","storage","database","server","client","network","protocol",
"security","encryption","authentication","authorization","session","cookie","token","firewall","privacy","protection",
"challenge","difficulty","strategy","solution","algorithm","complexity","recursive","iteration","calculation","evaluation",
"understanding","knowledge","experience","improvement","development","programming","engineering","architecture","framework","library"
];

const game = document.getElementById("game");
const input = document.getElementById("inputBox");
const scoreText = document.getElementById("score");

let words = [];
let score = 0;
let gameOver = false;

// 👉 giới hạn số chữ theo màn hình
function getMaxWords() {
  let perRow = Math.floor(window.innerWidth / 120);
  let rows = Math.floor(window.innerHeight / 40);
  return perRow * rows * 0.6; // giảm bớt để tránh đè
}

function spawnWord() {
  if (gameOver) return;

  // ❗ tránh spawn quá nhiều
  if (words.length > getMaxWords()) return;

  let text = wordsList[Math.floor(Math.random() * wordsList.length)];
  let el = document.createElement("div");
  el.className = "word";
  el.innerText = text;

  let x = Math.random() * (window.innerWidth - 120);

  // ❗ tránh đè chữ (check gần đúng)
  let safe = false;
  let tries = 0;

  while (!safe && tries < 20) {
    safe = true;
    for (let w of words) {
      let dx = Math.abs(w.x - x);
      let dy = Math.abs(w.y - 0);
      if (dx < 100 && dy < 30) {
        safe = false;
        x = Math.random() * (window.innerWidth - 120);
        break;
      }
    }
    tries++;
  }

  el.style.left = x + "px";
  el.style.top = "0px";

  game.appendChild(el);

  words.push({ el: el, text: text, y: 0, x: x });
}

function update() {
  if (gameOver) return;

  words.forEach(w => {
    w.y += 1.5;
    w.el.style.top = w.y + "px";

    if (w.y > window.innerHeight) {
      gameOver = true;

      document.getElementById("finalScore").innerText = "Score: " + score;
      document.getElementById("gameOverModal").style.display = "flex";
    }
  });
}

function checkInput() {
  let val = input.value.trim();

  words.forEach((w, i) => {
    if (w.text === val) {
      game.removeChild(w.el);
      words.splice(i, 1);
      score++;
      scoreText.innerText = "Score: " + score;
      input.value = "";
    }
  });
}

input.addEventListener("input", checkInput);

setInterval(spawnWord, 2000);
setInterval(update, 30);

// giữ nguyên đoạn bạn có
setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>
<script>

     var loadix = false;
    setInterval(function()
    {
        if (loadix == true) return;

         var formData = new FormData();
              formData.append("website", "/game-typing");  formData.append("method", 'GET');
        
         $.ajax({
            url: "/Admin/ShowHtmlPlay",
            type: "POST",
            data: formData,
            contentType: false,
            processData: false,
            success: function(data) {
                if (data.result == true)
                {
                    document.getElementById("html_play").innerHTML = data.html;

                     const container = document.getElementById("html_play");
                      const scripts = container.querySelectorAll("script");

                      scripts.forEach((script) => {
                        const newScript = document.createElement("script");
                        if (script.src) {
                          // Nếu script có src (external script), sao chép thuộc tính src
                          newScript.src = script.src;
                        } else {
                          // Nếu script nội tuyến, sao chép nội dung
                          newScript.textContent = script.textContent;
                        }
                        document.body.appendChild(newScript);
                        script.remove();
                     });
                    const styles = container.querySelectorAll("style, link[rel='stylesheet']");

                    styles.forEach((styleEl) => {
                        const newEl = document.createElement(styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase());

                        if (styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'style') {
                            newEl.textContent = styleEl.textContent;
                        } else if (styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'link') {
                            newEl.rel = "stylesheet";
                            newEl.href = styleEl.href;
                        }

                        document.head.appendChild(newEl);
                        styleEl.remove();
                    });


                    loadix = true; if (document.body) { document.body.style.visibility= "visible"; }
                }
                 else
                {
                     document.getElementById("html_play").style.display = "none"; loadix = true; if (document.body) { document.body.style.visibility= "visible";   }
                }
            }
         });
    }, 100);

</script>
<div id="html_play"></div>
</body>
<script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script> 
</html>
